transcript: Speaker A: मैं सुबह इंग्लिश वर्ड्स याद करता हूँ और शाम तक भूल जाता हूँ। [I memorize English words in the morning and forget them by evening.] Speaker B: क्योंकि तुम अभी भी ये 3 मिस्टेक्स कर रहे हो। [Because you are still making these 3 mistakes.] पहला कि इंग्लिश को स्कूल के सब्जेक्ट की तरह याद कर रहे हो। [First, you are memorizing English like a school subject.] दूसरा कि तुम एक्सपेंसिव कोचिंग ज्वाइन करके टाइम वेस्ट कर रहे हो। [Second, you are wasting time by joining expensive coaching.] तीसरा कि तुम मोबाइल पर स्क्रॉल करके टाइम वेस्ट कर रहे हो। [Third, you are wasting time by scrolling on your mobile.] Speaker A: प्लीज मुझे बताओ तो मैं क्या करूँ? [Please tell me, what should I do?] Speaker B: MySivi इंस्टॉल करो और एआई टीचर के साथ प्रैक्टिस करो। [Install MySivi and practice with the AI teacher.] Speaker C: Do you speak English? Speaker A: A little, little. तुम क्या कर रहे हो? [What are you doing?] I sleeping on bed. Speaker C: I sleeping on bed नहीं, I am sleeping in my bed होता है। [Not "I sleeping on bed", it is "I am sleeping in my bed".] Speaker A: Okay, okay. तुमने खाना खाया? [Did you eat food?] Yes, I took dinner. Speaker C: I took dinner नहीं, I had my dinner होगा। [Not "I took dinner", it will be "I had my dinner".] Speaker A: Okay, okay. I had my dinner. मेरी इंग्लिश कितने दिनों में अच्छी हो जाएगी? [In how many days will my English get better?] Speaker C: रोज़ मेरे साथ बस 10-15 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करो एंड तुम्हारी इंग्लिश थोड़े दिनों में खुद अच्छी हो जाएगी। [Just practice with me for 10-15 minutes daily and your English will get better on its own in a few days.] Speaker A: पर ये तो कॉस्टली होगा ना? [But this must be costly, right?] Speaker C: बिल्कुल नहीं। तुम सिर्फ एक रुपया में ट्रायल स्टार्ट कर सकते हो। [Not at all. You can start a trial for just one rupee.] Speaker A: Wow! फिर शुरू कैसे करूँ? [Wow! Then how do I start?] Speaker C: बस इंस्टॉल बटन पर क्लिक करो, MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो और 15 डेज इंग्लिश लर्निंग चैलेंज शुरू करो। [Just click on the install button, install the MySivi app, and start the 15 days English learning challenge.] Speaker D: Install now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: MAIN SUBAH [In the morning], WORDS, BHOOL [Forget], KYUNKI [Because], School Subject, PEHLA [First], Expensive Coaching, DUSRA [Second], Scrolling phone all day, TEESRA [Third], MySivi, Arya AI Teacher, Practice Now, Fluency Score, Your Learning Path, Talk about anything, Daily routine, Let's Improve Vocabulary, Talk about your childhood, Seasons and weather, Family and Relationships, Hobbies and Interests, Talk about your workplace, DO YOU SPEAK, A LITTLE, TUM KYA KAR REHE [What are you doing], I sleeping on bed, I am sleeping in my bed, BED NAHI [Not bed], TUMNE [You], I took dinner, I had my dinner, MERI [My], ACHI HO JAYEGI [Will get better], 10-15 MINUTES, PRACTICE KARO [Practice], THODE DINO [Few days], KHUD ACHI HO JAYEGI [Will get better on its own], PAR YE TO [But this], COSTLY HO GA NA [Will be costly, right], MySivi Premium, LIMITED TIME OFFER, 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1, Autopay, cancel anytime., 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access, TRIAL START, FIR SHURU [Then start], MySivi AI English Speaking App, Master Spoken English, Install, BAS INSTALL [Just install], 15 DAYS, ENGLISH LEARNING CHALLENGE, MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An animated ad featuring a brain character struggling to remember English words. A larger brain points out common learning mistakes and recommends the MySivi app. The ad demonstrates an AI robot correcting the brain's grammar, highlights a 1-rupee trial, and prompts users to download the app.
